version_description: Includes chords, intro and strumming pattern.
tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Halsey
"You Should Be Sad"

Standard Tuning. Capo 2nd fret.


[tab][Intro]
  [ch]Am[/ch]               [ch]F[/ch]                [ch]C[/ch]                [ch]Em[/ch]
e|----------------|----------------|----------------|----------------|
B|---3--1---0-----|------1-------1-|------1-------3-|------0-------1-|
G|--2-----------2-|---2------2-----|---0------0-----|---0------0-----|
D|----------------|----------------|----------------|----------------|
A|0---0---0---0---|----------------|3---3---3---3---|----------------|
E|----------------|1---1---1---1---|----------------|0---0---0---0---|[/tab]


[Verse 1]
[tab]        [ch]Am[/ch]
I wanna start this out and say[/tab]
[tab]        [ch]F[/ch]
I gotta get it off my chest[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
Got no anger, got no malice[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Just a little bit of regret[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Know nobody else will tell you[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]F[/ch]
So there's some things I gotta say[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]C[/ch]
Gonna jot it down and then get it out[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
And then I'll be on my way[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]
No, you're not half the man you think that you are[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Em[/ch]
And you can't fill the hole inside of you with money, drugs, and cars[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
I'm so glad I never ever had a baby with you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]Em[/ch]
'Cause you can't love nothing unless there's something in it for you[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Oh, I feel so sorry, I feel so sad[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]                          [ch]Em[/ch]
I tried to help you, it just made you mad[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]                   [ch]F[/ch]
And I had no warning about who you are[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]
I'm just glad I made it out without breaking down[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]Em[/ch]
And then ran so fucking far[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]                  [ch]F[/ch]
That you would never ever touch me again[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
Won't see your alligator tears[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
'Cause, no, I've had enough of them[/tab]


[Post-Chorus]
[ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]


[Verse 2]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]
Let me start this off by saying[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]F[/ch]
I really meant well from the start[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]C[/ch]
Take a broken man right in my hands[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Em[/ch]
And then put back all his parts[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]               [ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]
But you're not half the man you think that you are[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Em[/ch]
And you can't fill the hole inside of you with money, girls, and cars[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
I'm so glad I never ever had a baby with you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]Em[/ch]
'Cause you can't love nothing unless there's something in it for you[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh, I feel so sorry (I feel so sorry)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
I feel so sad (I feel so sad)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
I tried to help you (I tried to help you)[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
It just made you mad[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
And I had no warning (I had no warning)[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]
About who you are (About who you are)[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]C[/ch]                             [ch]Em[/ch]
Just glad I made it out without breaking down[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
Oh, I feel so sorry (I feel so sorry)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]F[/ch]
I feel so sad (I feel so sad)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]C[/ch]
I tried to help you (I tried to help you)[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Em[/ch]
It just made you mad[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
And I had no warning (I had no warning)[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]F[/ch]
About who you are (About who you are)[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]Em[/ch]
'Bout who you are[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Hey[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Hey[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Hey[/tab]
[tab][ch]Em[/ch]
Hey[/tab]
     (x2)


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]                  [ch]Am[/ch]                             [ch]F[/ch]
'Cause you're not half the man you think that you are[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]C[/ch]                                [ch]Em[/ch]
And you can't fill the hole inside of you with money, drugs, and cars[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]                     [ch]F[/ch]
I'm so glad I never ever had a baby with you[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]Em[/ch]
'Cause you can't love nothing unless there's something in it for you[/tab]


[Outro]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]
   I feel so sad[/tab]
[tab]                [ch]C[/ch]
   You should be sad[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
   You should be[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Am[/ch]
   You should be sad[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]F[/ch]
   You should be[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]C[/ch]
   You should be[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Em[/ch]
   You should be[/tab]

[tab][ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]Em[/ch]
Ooh...[/tab]
